commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens plugin, provider, channel, Codex app-server, SDK, startup, and outbound action metadata readers against malformed or unreadable synthetic plugin data with broad focused regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the remaining review blockers: source inspection shows the JSON helper accepts non-plain objects and the descriptor key helper collides string and bigint values. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
